subcodes.first_line: The Sun of Glory, once visible from behind the veil of abasement upon the horizon of tribulation, was manifest when We entered the prison and attained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شمس العز عن خلف حجاب الذل من افق البلاء قد کان مرئیا دخلنا السجن و بلغنا
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @call to action
